sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root יָרָה Hiph. No. 4. to teach).-

(1) instruction, doctrine, Job 22:22.-(a) human, as that of parents, Pro 1:8 3:1 4:2 7:2 .-(b) divine through prophets, Isa 1:10 8:16 , 20 42:4 , 21 Isa 42:21.

(2) law.-(a) human, the manner and principles which men follow, 2Sa 7:19.-(b) divine, whether one, followed by a genit. of the object, e.g. the law of sacrifice, Lev 6:7 7:7 or collect. laws; סֵפֶר הַתֹּורָה the book of the law, Jos 1:8 8:34 2 Ki. 22:8 , 11 2Ki 22:11 Neh 8:3 plur. תֹּורֹות laws, Exo 18:20 Lev 26:46.
